description.value:
Granted by @UUID[Compendium.cotct-pf2e-conversion.cotct-items.Item.eH0bciL3TgRdu6dt]{Shoanti War Paint (Black)} — one application, lasting 1 hour. You can benefit from only one color of Shoanti war paint at a time; applying a different color replaces this effect.

You become cloaked in shadows and smoke, gaining the effects of a @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.3JG1t3T4mWn6vTke]{Blur} spell.

No rule element: concealment from blur is rolled per-attack by the GM (automation would be fragile).

publication.title: Pathfinder: Curse of the Crimson Throne (PF2e conversion, private)
